name: PayPal
overview: PayPal is a global fintech company operating a worldwide online payments system. Focus on secure, scalable payment processing.
hiringProcess: PayPal's process includes an online coding test, 2 technical rounds focusing on DSA and system design, and an HR round.
eligibility: Strong Java/Spring skills, understanding of payment systems and security.
preparationTips: Focus on concurrency, transaction handling, and secure system design. Practice medium DSA problems.
